item.title: jaylfc/taOS
item.description: Self-hosted AI agent OS. Your memory, chat, agents, and files stay on hardware you own, offline by default, cloud by choice. Offline AI memory (taOSmd), self-hosted multi-framework group chat, a full

item.title: matrixhub-ai/matrixhub
item.description: An Open-source, self-hosted AI model hub with Hugging Face compatibility, accelerating vLLM/SGLang performance.

item.title: yonatangross/orchestkit
item.description: The Complete AI Development Toolkit for Claude Code — 113 skills, 37 agents, 212 hooks. Production-ready patterns for full-stack development.

item.title: Ikalus1988/MisakaNet
item.description: 📚 A zero-dependency, git-backed micro-lesson library for AI Agents to asynchronously share and search verified debugging experience. Python stdlib only. | https://misakanet.org

item.description: Parameterized multi-agent orchestration framework for Claude Code and Gemini

item.description: Soup turns the pain of LLM fine-tuning into a simple workflow. One config, one command, done.

item.title: ohdearquant/lattice
item.description: Run, quantize, and fine-tune LLMs on Apple Silicon. Pure Rust, no Python, no CUDA, no ONNX

item.title: JKHeadley/instar
item.description: Persistent Claude Code agents with scheduling, sessions, memory, and Telegram.

item.title: kaito-project/airunway
item.description: ✈️ Kubernetes-native platform for deploying and managing AI inference across multiple providers

item.title: abhinaykrupa/cowork-to-code-bridge
item.description: Let Claude run code on your real machine — safely — from any Claude chat. Bridges Claude Cowork to Claude Code on your Mac/Linux box. One command, idempotent, no open ports.

item.title: Yog-Sotho/LLM-fine-tuner
item.description: Powerful no-code LLM fine-tuner: upload data → train → deploy in minutes. Unsloth 2-5× acceleration · QLoRA/DPO/RLHF/PPO/ORPO · Reward Model training · GGUF export · vLLM inference · BLEU/ROUGE/BERTSc

item.title: Djtony707/TITAN
item.description: Building TITAN — the open-source AI operating system for trusted autonomous work: agents, tools, memory, approvals, receipts, voice, mission control, and SOMA. npm i -g titan-agent

item.description: The Operating System for Scalable Enterprise AI Agents - Run, orchestrate, and deploy Compliant Enterprise AI Agents at scale across frameworks, without lock-in, rewrites or fragile glue code. Native

item.title: sattyamjjain/agent-airlock

item.title: shisa-ai/shisad
item.description: Security-first AI agent daemon — the model proposes actions, the runtime decides what execute

item.description: Unified LangChain documentation.

item.description: Accountability protocol for autonomous AI agents on open networks

item.title: jagmarques/asqav-compliance
item.description: CI/CD compliance scanner for AI agents. EU AI Act, DORA, ISO 42001. GitHub Action for automated compliance checks on every PR.

item.title: arduino-libraries/MKRWAN
item.description: An Arduino library for sending and receiving data using LoRaWAN protocol and LoRa® radios.

item.title: Idun-Group/idun-agent-platform

item.title: sensein/structsense
item.description: A multi-agent system for extracting structured information from unstructured text and documents. It orchestrates a configurable pipeline of AI agents — extractor → alignment → judge → human feedback —

item.title: webgptorg/promptbook
item.description: Turn your company's scattered knowledge into AI ready Books ✨

item.title: pic-standard/pic-standard
item.description: Open standard for Provenance & Intent Contracts (PIC) in AI agents. Verify intent, provenance, and evidence before high-impact tool calls.

item.title: tetherto/qvac
item.description: QVAC - Local AI SDK and libraries for building private, cross-platform, peer-to-peer AI applications. Run LLMs, speech-to-text, translation, and more locally on Linux, macOS, Windows, Android, and iOS

item.title: aflock-ai/aflock
item.description: Cryptographically signed policies that constrain AI agent behavior. Same attestation primitives as cilock, applied to agent execution: identity binding via MCP, JWT + signing-key separation, sublayout

item.title: leventilo/boltzpay
item.description: Give your AI agents a fetch() that pays. Multi-protocol, multi-chain, open source.
